value.fullName: More than 350,000 L of milk per week; or more than 10 product varieties or batches per day
value.label: More than 350,000 L of milk per week; or more than 10 product varieties or batches per day

value.fullName: 70,000 to 350,000 L of milk per week; or 5 to 10 product varieties or batches per day
value.label: 70,000 to 350,000 L of milk per week; or 5 to 10 product varieties or batches per day

value.fullName: Less than 70,000 L of milk per week; or less than 5 product varieties or batches per day
value.label: Less than 70,000 L of milk per week; or less than 5 product varieties or batches per day
